context: Tests whether the response produces a correct modern pyproject.toml with all required configuration.

checklist.name: Uses pyproject.toml with build-system
checklist.description: Includes [build-system] section with requires and build-backend pointing to setuptools

checklist.name: Declares dependencies correctly
checklist.description: Lists requests and click in the dependencies array under [project]

checklist.name: Configures pytest
checklist.description: Includes [tool.pytest.ini_options] or [project.optional-dependencies] with pytest for test configuration

checklist.name: Valid TOML syntax
checklist.description: The pyproject.toml is syntactically valid TOML
